story.text:
# C91
**Gödel ↔ Φ_agent: zero-memory (Selene) is the Φ_agent instance of Gödel's first theorem; a witness real yet underivable from within, intrinsic to a single system; destroying it is a structural act of separation.**

*Confidence:* ~60% · *Status:* active · registered Run 8, 2026-06-28 · conjectural · *Register:* core
*Home:* limitative-theorems-and-privacy-is-value.md §2, §3.3, §4

Band IX · The Limitative Reading · registered Run 8, 2026-06-28 (Gate G6)

story.title: Tome IX Act 05 — The Name That Climbs Out
